result.reason: Keyboard shortcuts defined using .NET Keys enum and potentially low-level keyboard message processing may conflict with national keyboard layouts, leading to unexpected behavior or inaccessible functionality for international users.
result.approach: Investigate how keyboard events are processed at both high (ShortcutKeys) and low (WM_KEYDOWN/WM_KEYUP messages) levels in mRemoteNG, focusing on compatibility with national keyboard layouts. Identify specific conflicting shortcuts or input handling logic and explore alternative key assignments or input processing methods to ensure consistent behavior across different locales.
